top_insights: The $299M threshold isn't arbitrary; it's the point where you stop fearing the system.
Degrees prove you can follow instructions; wealth proves you can ignore them.
Nobody is coming to save you, and that terrifying realization is your greatest leverage.
Public perception is curated; true power operates in the unretouched, unspoken margins.
Stop waiting for permission to build; the only credential that matters is revenue.
hook_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge common assumptions or social norms
Insightful reveals using specific data points, names, or historical facts
Personal anecdotes framed as exclusive or previously untold stories
emotional_drivers: Validation of the reader's skepticism or independent worldview
Aspiration toward status, wealth, and leverage
Relief from the pressure of needing external approval or rescue
emerging_narrative: A shift toward radical self-reliance and 'insider truth,' where audiences resonate with narratives that expose hidden realities of wealth and power while validating the idea that success and safety come from individual agency rather than systemic support.

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I have a friend who used to work for 2 billionaires after all he's seen he said to me, "I wish you not one penny over $299 million. Reality gets completely lost somewhere after that." I think about that sometimes.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

viral_examples.author: thedankoe
viral_examples.text: Normalize not having an opinion on things you don’t understand.

winning_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge common assumptions or social norms
Insightful reveals using specific data points, names, or historical facts
Personal anecdotes framed as exclusive or previously untold stories
